---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What problem does this feature solve?

**Proposed solution**
How should it work? Include example Cedar policies, CLI commands, or code snippets.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've considered and why this one is better.

**Use case**
Who would use this and how? (e.g., "As a team lead, I want to...")
